name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax Title Loans Glendale, Arizona — TitleMax offers same-day title loans and flex lines of credit secured by your vehicle, accepting most credit ty...
description_long:
TitleMax is a national title lending chain with hundreds of store locations across the South and Midwest. The Summer Avenue Memphis location has been operating since February 2007 and serves residents throughout greater Memphis with in-store and online lending products. TitleMax is owned by TMX Finance, one of the largest consumer lending companies in the United States specializing in title-secured loans.

This location offers three core products. The first is a title pledge — a loan secured by your vehicle title where the car's value, rather than your credit score alone, determines approval and loan amount. The second is a Flex Line of Credit, a secured revolving credit line tied to your vehicle title that lets borrowers withdraw funds up to their credit limit all at once or incrementally. The third is an unsecured flexible line of credit, available both in-store and online, which requires no collateral — only a valid ID, active bank account, and proof of income. Online unsecured loans are limited to residents of AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, and WI.

What distinguishes this location is its long tenure (operational since 2007), bilingual staff, and an exceptionally strong local reputation — 481+ Google reviews averaging 5.0 stars at the time of this profile. Staff members including Nicole and Joyce are repeatedly cited by name for professionalism and transparency. The flex line of credit structure is a notable differentiator over traditional title loans, giving borrowers revolving access to funds rather than a single lump-sum disbursement.

Honest assessment: TitleMax title loans are a legitimate emergency cash tool for credit-challenged borrowers who own their vehicle, but they come with serious financial risk. APRs on title loans are typically in the triple-digit range — a fact not disclosed on the company website. Failure to repay can result in vehicle repossession. These products are best used as a last resort when no lower-cost alternative is available, and borrowers should have a clear repayment plan before applying.
pros: Accepts most credit types — vehicle title supplements weak credit history
Flex line of credit allows partial withdrawals over time rather than one lump sum
Bilingual staff available at this location
Unsecured personal line of credit option available (no vehicle required)
Borrower keeps driving their vehicle while the loan is active
481+ Google reviews averaging 5.0 stars — strong local service reputation
cons: APR not disclosed on website — title loans typically carry triple-digit interest rates
Vehicle repossession risk if loan goes unpaid
Online unsecured loans restricted to 11 states; not available nationwide
Closed Sundays; Saturday hours end at 4:00 pm — limited weekend access
Loan amount is capped by vehicle value, which may fall short of the cash needed
best_for: Borrowers with poor or thin credit who own a paid-off vehicle
Memphis-area residents who need cash the same day
Consumers who want a revolving credit line to draw from incrementally rather than a one-time loan
Borrowers in eligible states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI) seeking an unsecured personal credit line
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for credit-challenged borrowers who own a vehicle outright and need emergency cash faster than a bank or credit union can provide it. The main caveat is significant: title loans carry very high interest rates (commonly 100–300% APR) and vehicle repossession risk that the company's website does not quantify — borrowers should exhaust lower-cost options first.
services: Flex line of credit (vehicle-secured revolving credit)
Online customer portal for loan management
